The Relationship between Nature and the Prophet Muhammed is Evaluated by the Last Book of Ibn Haldun University Publications

11.09.2023

Ibn Haldun University Publications continues publishing with Faculty of Our Islamic Sciences Faculty Member Serdar Demirel's book "Prophet Muhammed and Nature".

Ibn Haldun University Publications continues its publishing activities as an initiative of Ibn Haldun University Publications. The book, published under the title "Prophet Muhammed and Nature", reconciles the current concepts of environmental crises with the Qur'anic perspective.

Finding Harmony with Nature in Qur'anic Teachings and Sunnah

Allah (swt) knows the characteristics of the beings He created and whether they have consciousness or not. He has also revealed the meaning and wisdom of the existence of natural beings through the prophet He has sent to humanity. Qur'anic teachings and the prophetic way of life introduce the universe to human beings by relating it to metaphysics. It teaches how to look at the world of existence in terms of particulars and universals.

Prophetic Perspective on the Relevance of Environmental Concepts

Our Faculty of Islamic Sciences Faculty Member Serdar Demirel, who deals with the environment, which is nowadays mentioned together with concepts such as ecology, ecosystem, biodiversity, sustainability, environmental pollution, climate change, waste management, natural resources, renewable energy and environmental protection, as a matter of mentality and imagination, brings his many years of experience together with today's readers with the title "Prophet Muhammed and Nature". The work, which was written in order to show the nature of this issue of mentality and imagination and to examine the model of living in harmony with nature in the special case of the Prophet of Islam, Prophet Mohammed (pbuh), is presented to the readers under the roof of Ibn Haldun University Publications.

You can reach the book from selected bookstores or online websites.
